original_final_question: From the Washington school districts that met ELA performance >= 68% for all students, all grades in each year from 2014-15 through 2017-18, which county both borders Idaho and had a 2020 population under 300,000? Return the county name only. Your response should be in the format [Answer].
reasoning_chain_text: 1. Identify Washington school districts with ELA performance at least 68 percent for all students and all grades in 2014-15.
2. From those districts, keep the ones meeting the same condition in 2015-16.
3. From the remaining districts, keep the ones meeting the same condition in 2016-17.
4. From the remaining districts, keep the ones meeting the same condition in 2017-18 and carry forward the county subset implied by those surviving districts.
5. Using the next county reference page for that carried-forward county subset, determine whether the county borders Idaho and whether its 2020 population is under 300,000.
6. Using the final county reference page for that carried-forward county subset, apply the same checks and return the county name that satisfies them.
original_reasoning_chain: Intersection -> counties {King, Clark, Pierce, Whitman, Thurston, Spokane}
HOP 2 (d=2, Wikipedia filter - nodes 5-6 depend on hop 1):
Node 5: Whitman County borders Idaho and has 2020 population 47,973 (<300,000) -> qualifies
Node 6: Spokane County borders Idaho but has 2020 population 539,339 (>300,000) -> does not qualify
